creator: andrew.hotlab@hotmail.com
text:
Version 1.2 of py-vatnumber depends on py-stdnum:
https://code.google.com/p/vatnumber/source/detail?r=f900f961c241ba54c098dd2a1b624c88a4bdb596

The new port devel/py-stdnum has been just committed by Kurt Jaeger and tested on production systems by me:
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-ports-all/2015-July/100364.html

Please make this port depend from devel/py-stdnum.

Thanks in advance.
